tasks.label: Daily vitals
tasks.nudge: Sixty second vitals. Pain, energy, tier.

tasks.label: Water
tasks.nudge: Sip water. Even a few ounces counts.

tasks.label: Meds
tasks.nudge: Meds time, if today's protocol includes them.

tasks.label: Brush teeth
tasks.nudge: Teeth. Even a quick brush counts on a hard day.

tasks.label: Wash face
tasks.nudge: Cool or lukewarm water on your face. One minute.

tasks.label: Morning food
tasks.nudge: Something small for the morning. Body first.

tasks.label: Evening food
tasks.nudge: Evening food. Two small meals or four snacks on red days.

tasks.label: Midday reset
tasks.nudge: Five minute reset. Say reset5 when ready.

tasks.label: Reset-deep before bed
tasks.nudge: Reset-deep before sleep. Mandatory on yellow and red.

tasks.label: Shutdown script
tasks.nudge: Shutdown script. Close the day. Say shutdown.
